WELL-EQUIPPED Cost: 2/4/6/8 Through connections, good fortune Or other circumstances well equipped character has access t0 rare equipment: This iS represented in game terms by access t0 gear with higher equip ment ratings (see Equipment; p. 1291. The exceptions are Clan characters who can start with equipment rated Up to E_ and Periphery charac tCrs who are restricted (0 Tech Level C well-equipped character can purchase starting equipment beyond these ranges, Every points of Well-Equipped increas the letter grade of availability and legality by one_ while every points increases the allowable tech level by one letter grade from thc standard for his affiliation. WELL-E CONNECTED Cost: 2/4/6 well connected character possesses large number friends, acquaintances and foes Such character can call on contacts for information and help but must also watch out for enemies The cost of this advantagc is based on the area in which the character has potential contacts The player must choose the specific area when purchasing this trait; For 2 points the cnaracter may use this advantage on single important world- such as New Avalon or Solaris VII within small state such as the St. Ives Compact or the Saiph Triumvirate_ Four points makes the character well-connected within large state. such as the Free Worlds League the Outworlas Alliance For points the character i5 well-connected  throughout the Inner Sphere or Clan homeworlds_ To use the trait to find contact; the player character must first spend 206 hours looking for contact, Then the character must make Streetwise (for criminal or underworld contacts).
